zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Aucher於1562年出生在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞時，她的父親Sir Edward Aucher I23歲，母親Mabel Wroth20歲。她於1581年與Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden在英國英格蘭肯特貝黑斯達結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1627年12月3日在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Aucher于1562年出生在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞时，她的父亲Sir Edward Aucher I23岁，母亲Mabel Wroth20岁。她于1581年与Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden在英国英格兰肯特貝黑斯達结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1627年12月3日在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Aucher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German: occupational name for someone who watched cattle at night, from Middle High German uhte ‘night watch, night pasture’, or ‘time just before dawn’. Compare Auch .
Scottish: topographic name from Gaelic uachdar ‘upland, summit’, or a habitational name from a place in Perthshire named with this word.

variants.name: Auch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Egon, Hermann, Otto.

South German (mainly Stuttgart): metonymic occupational name for someone who minded cattle at night, from Middle High German uhte ‘night watch, night pasture’, or ‘time just before dawn’. Compare Auchter .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Aucher was born in 1562, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Edward Aucher I, was 23 and her mother, Mabel Wroth, was 20. She married Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden in 1581, in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 3 December 1627, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Aucher est née en 1562, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edward Aucher I, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mabel Wroth, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden en 1581, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 décembre 1627, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Aucher 1562 in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward Aucher I 23 und ihre Mutter Mabel Wroth 20. Sie hat 1581 in Bethersden, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. Dezember 1627 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Aucher è nata il nel 1562 nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Edward Aucher I, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Mabel Wroth, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden nel 1581, nel Bethersden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Aucher(이)가 1562년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Aucher I(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel Wroth(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1581년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베더즈든에서 Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1627년 12월 3일 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Aucher nasceu em 1562, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Edward Aucher I, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Wroth, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden em 1581, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1627, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Aucher родилась в 1562 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Aucher I было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel Wroth, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden в 1581 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 декабря 1627 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури кэтедраль, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden en 1581, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1627, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
